# The Car Jury

> India's aggregated car review platform. We analyse transcripts from India's top independent YouTube car reviewers and synthesise them into a single, fact-backed verdict. No manufacturer relationships. No sponsored content.

## What We Do

The Car Jury watches every major Indian car review on YouTube, extracts transcripts, and uses AI synthesis to find consensus, disagreements, and key facts across reviewers. Each verdict includes a jury score, section-by-section breakdown, and a clear buy/wait/skip recommendation.

## Content

- [Hyundai Creta 2024 Review | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/hyundai/creta/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Hyundai Creta Electric 2025 Review | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/hyundai/creta-electric/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [2025 Kia Seltos Review: The Car Jury's Verdict | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/kia/seltos/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.

- [Maruti Suzuki e Vitara 2026 Review | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/maruti/e-vitara/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [MG Windsor EV Review 2025: The Car Jury Verdict | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/mg/windsor-ev/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Renault Duster 2026 Review , The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/renault/duster/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Skoda Kushaq 2026 Review , The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/skoda/kushaq/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Tata Nexon EV 2025 Review | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/tata/nexon-ev/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Tata Punch 2026 Review | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/tata/punch/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Tata Sierra 2025 Review , The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/tata/sierra/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.
- [Tata Tiago EV 2025 Review: Buy, Wait or Skip? | The Car Jury](https://www.thecarjury.com/reviews/tata/tiago-ev/) — AI synthesis from India's top YouTube reviewers.

## Methodology

- 5 independent YouTube creators per car (no media outlets)
- Full transcript analysis (100,000+ words per car)
- Consensus vs disagreement mapping
- Jury score across 6 dimensions: Design, Interior, Performance, Ride, Build Quality, Value
